description: T6 -- Re-verify and close: a fresh full 14-spec run produces an assembled draft that passes whole-draft coverage by construction (closing TASK-034), and re-assess TASK-026's distribution premise against the corrected pipeline (FGAP-033 closure).
acceptance_criteria: A fresh full sequence run produces an assembled draft on which the whole-draft coverage check passes (every learner outcome and improvement area targeted or recorded as an explicit gap).

The same run's assembled distribution check passes (more than one owner, no owner more than 50%), and TASK-026's status is updated to record whether its distribution premise is superseded, with the run's evidence.

The run completes end-to-end; outputs parse; the catalogue-gate raises no new rejection; the snippet-substrate parity gate passes 14/14; the project gate is green; and no structural check (coverage, distribution, cadence) is failing.
